data.body: 0ba4 fix PUSHED as Gerrit change 746 (stacked atop 741). Local re-assessment: fixed build signs ALL authored event types (CREATE/COMMENT/EDIT/FILE_IMPACT/STATUS-transition/claim/close), merge-gate exit 0. Teeth confirmed. Full suite 6217 passed / 3 failed (3 = config-show/perf tests detecting this machine's ~/.config/rebar/config.toml via a test-isolation gap; pass without it + on CI; NOT a code regression; follow-up bug d716-3bce-7a95-4549 filed discovered_from 79da). Gerrit: 741 GREEN (LLM-Review+Verified approved); 746 votes pending. DEPLOYMENT-GATED TAIL: the anchor (8d91) + flip (8d39) require 0ba4 LIVE across all writer builds (local global auto-updates hourly; CI uses main; Gerrit VM autodeploys ADR-0026) so post-anchor transitions from every writer sign. Plan: land 741+746, close 0ba4 + 1a51 (canary), then after deployment propagates validate the pre-flip gate + decide anchor + flip.
